title: Head Placer
description: Datapack that places your player head upon death, above a fence and a bedrock block, similar to UHC gamemode
body:
A datapack for those who want to recall UHC essence. Any player that dies will have their head placed at their death location along with a bedrock block and a fence.

You can use other datapacks to give benefits for getting the player head, thus rewarding kills in a pvp game, or simply keeping it as a remain from fallen teammates in a Hardcore server.
